proven_comparative_edges.meaning: The duplicate initial treatment directly feeds the replacement covering shots 7-17.

ordered_references.status: No ordered media-input stream is directly joined to this working-candidate group.

image.reason: The group requires stable identities for the guardian, scout, two attendants, tiger, weapon, and frontier.

video.reason: The warning, reactions, drum action, tiger arrival, and commitment depend on ordered motion and camera staging.

audio.reason: Dialogue, wind, machine approach, drums, and tiger vocalization carry the mobilization objective.

revisions_and_failures.revision_scope: The comparative replacement changes the later part of this group and carries a tiger-design and battle-framing delta into the next group.

evidence_limits: The replacement is directly linked to an alternate 16-shot treatment, not to the 29-shot working candidate.
No image, video, or audio node can be assigned to this group without an unproven semantic or layout inference.
The stale text attempt proves stale-state evidence, not rejection or supersession authority.
